text.title: GraphQL API Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-graphql artefact.

step.name: schema-draft
step.action: Draft SDL types + relations; mark scalars nullable by default.

step.name: dataloader-coverage
step.action: For every 1-to-N relation, define a DataLoader; commit factory under templates/dataloader-factory.ts.

step.name: depth-and-complexity
step.action: Set max_depth + max_complexity; reject queries above caps.

step.name: persisted-queries
step.action: Generate persisted-query manifest; gate production endpoint to allowlist hashes.

step.name: errors-and-publish
step.action: Implement formatError to emit RFC 7807 extension; emit GQL-* artefact.
step.decision-gate: n_plus_1_hotspots > 0 OR persisted_queries_only=false in prod → verdict=fail.
